column6: Activates rear delts/rhomboids to set scapula.
Core/Glute stability required. Do not arch back.
Leaning forward for chest. Add weight belt if bodyweight >12 reps.
Targets upper chest shelf. Constant tension.
Unilateral delt work. Constant tension throughout ROM.
Focus on locking out and spreading the rope at bottom.
Stretches the long head of the tricep. Essential for arm size.
External rotation for rotator cuff health.
